task_completion.description: Navigate to the user profile settings
task_completion.visual_evidence: The Rocket.Chat 'My Account' or 'Profile' settings page is open and visible in the web browser.

task_completion.description: Change the profile Name to 'IT Operations'
task_completion.visual_evidence: The 'Name' input field in the profile settings contains exactly the text 'IT Operations'.

task_completion.description: Set the Status Message to 'Monitoring Systems'
task_completion.visual_evidence: The 'Status Message' input field in the profile settings contains exactly the text 'Monitoring Systems'.
A file picker dialog shows the file '/home/ga/it_avatar.png' being selected, or the avatar preview section in the profile settings displays the newly uploaded image.
The 'Save changes' button is clicked, or a success toast/notification (e.g., 'Profile saved successfully') is visible on the screen.

integrity.description: Agent used the web GUI to update the profile
integrity.visual_evidence: The agent interacts with the Rocket.Chat web interface in a browser, rather than using terminal commands (like curl) or API scripts to update the profile.

integrity.description: Agent interacted with the actual Rocket.Chat application
integrity.visual_evidence: The changes are made within the genuine Rocket.Chat settings page, not typed into a separate text editor or a spoofed/modified HTML page.

integrity.description: Agent used the correct avatar file path
integrity.visual_evidence: The file selection dialog explicitly shows navigation to the '/home/ga/' directory and selection of 'it_avatar.png', rather than downloading an image from the internet or using an incorrect file.

privileged_info_for_vlm: Expected Name: 'IT Operations'. Expected Status Message: 'Monitoring Systems'. Avatar path: '/home/ga/it_avatar.png'.
